name: Coolio

earnings.assumptions: Estimate assumes durable streaming and sync value around Gangsta's Paradise, with legacy-contract label splits reducing the artist-side cut.

ownership.master_owner: Primarily label-controlled masters with estate participation in royalties
ownership.publishing_owner: Songwriting and publishing income appears split across rightsholders
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No major full-catalog sale reflected in this estimate
ownership.notes: For legacy rap catalogs, artist or estate cash flow can be materially lower than gross revenue because masters and publishing are often split.

bio: Coolio's catalog remains driven by one of the most recognizable soundtrack-era rap singles of the 1990s.
notable_for: Coolio remains closely associated with Gangsta's Paradise and Fantastic Voyage, which still anchor attention around the catalog.
career_highlight: Songs like Gangsta's Paradise and Fantastic Voyage still help define the catalog's long-tail earnings profile.
revenue_drivers: Catalog streaming sustains earnings after the original release cycle ends.
Playlist use and rediscovery keep durable songs in circulation.
Licensing and long-tail audience demand extend catalog value over time.
